name: Breaded Veal Cutlet (Weinerschnitzel)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 2 pounds of veal steak into pieces that are 1/2 inch thick.
2. Season both sides with salt and pepper.
3. Dredge each piece in crushed crackers or bread crumbs, then in beaten egg.
4. Coat again in bread crumbs.
5. Let the pieces stand for a few minutes to set the coating.
6. Heat oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
7. Fry each piece on both sides until golden brown and crispy.
8. Sprinkle with lemon juice and garnish with a fried egg per serving.
Source: Pennsylvania Dutch Cook Book - Fine Old Recipes, Culinary Arts Press, 1936.
